name: Hetzner Cloud
description: Hetzner Cloud API — servers, server actions, server types, images, locations, SSH keys, volumes. v0.2 rewrite against the real Hetzner Cloud API (https://docs.hetzner.cloud); replaces the placeholder catalog that always 404'd against /server-create-style paths.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Create at Hetzner Cloud Console → Security → API Tokens. Needs Read+Write to provision/destroy.

tools.name: server_list
tools.description: List servers in the project. Optional filters: name (exact match), label_selector, status, sort.

name.description: Filter to servers with this exact name

tools.name: server_get
tools.description: Fetch full details for one server by numeric id.

tools.name: server_create
tools.description: Create a new server (provisions a real VPS — billed). Required: name, server_type, image. Use `location` or `datacenter` to pick a region; `user_data` injects a cloud-init script so consumers can seed SSH keys without pre-registering them with Hetzner. Returns {server, action, root_password, next_actions}.

name.description: Unique name within the project (also becomes the hostname)

server_type.description: Current types (the cpx* line is deprecated): cx22/cx32/cx42/cx52 (Intel shared), cax11/cax21/cax31/cax41 (Ampere ARM, best €/vCPU), ccx13+ (dedicated AMD). Call server_types_list for the live catalog.

image.description: OS image name (ubuntu-24.04, debian-12, …) or numeric image id

location.description: Region: fsn1 (Falkenstein), nbg1 (Nuremberg), hel1 (Helsinki), ash (Ashburn), hil (Hillsboro), sin (Singapore). Mutually exclusive with datacenter.

datacenter.description: Specific datacenter; only set when you need finer control than location

ssh_keys.description: Hetzner-registered SSH key ids/names to seed at first boot. Prefer user_data + cloud-init if you don't want to pre-register keys.

firewalls.description: Firewalls to attach at create time; array of {firewall: id}

networks.description: Private networks to attach; array of network ids

volumes.description: Existing volume ids to attach at create time

user_data.description: Cloud-init userdata script (e.g. #cloud-config YAML). The instances app uses this to seed authorized_keys.

start_after_create.description: Default true; set false to leave the server powered off after provisioning

automount.description: If volumes are attached, mount them automatically. Default false.

tools.name: server_update
tools.description: Update mutable server properties: name + labels. Doesn't trigger reboot.

tools.name: server_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete the server. Stops billing. Idempotent: deleting an already-deleted server returns 404 (callers may treat as success).

tools.name: server_poweron
tools.description: Power on a stopped server. Returns the action; poll action_get to wait for completion.

tools.name: server_poweroff
tools.description: Hard-stop the server (equivalent to yanking the plug; prefer server_shutdown for graceful).

tools.name: server_reboot
tools.description: Soft-reboot via ACPI signal.

tools.name: server_shutdown
tools.description: Graceful ACPI shutdown. Use this before server_poweroff in normal workflows.

tools.name: server_reset
tools.description: Hard-reset via reset button (equivalent to power cycle).

tools.name: server_rebuild
tools.description: Wipe the server and re-provision from `image`. Data on the boot disk is lost; attached volumes survive.

image.description: Image name or id to rebuild from

tools.name: server_change_type
tools.description: Upgrade or downgrade the server to a different server_type. Requires the server to be powered off. Pass upgrade_disk=true to grow the disk (destructive: cannot downgrade afterwards).

upgrade_disk.description: If true, grow the boot disk to match the new type. Irreversible.

tools.name: server_change_protection
tools.description: Toggle delete/rebuild protection. Hetzner refuses destructive actions while the corresponding flag is true.

tools.name: server_enable_rescue
tools.description: Boot a rescue system on the next boot (linux64 by default). Returns root_password.

ssh_keys.description: SSH key ids to inject into the rescue system

tools.name: server_disable_rescue
tools.description: Cancel the queued rescue boot.

tools.name: server_reset_password
tools.description: Reset the root password (only works when no SSH key was injected; for SSH-key-only boxes use rescue mode). Returns the new root_password.

tools.name: server_request_console
tools.description: Mint a one-shot VNC console URL (wss_url) + password. Use for break-glass debugging when SSH is unreachable.

tools.name: server_get_metrics
tools.description: Time-series CPU / disk / network metrics for one server. Specify type (one or comma-separated: cpu, disk, network), ISO-8601 start + end, and step in seconds.

step.description: Step in seconds (e.g. 60 for per-minute samples)

tools.name: server_types_list
tools.description: List all server type SKUs available (cx22, cpx21, cax21, …). Use this to discover valid `server_type` values for server_create.

tools.name: images_list
tools.description: List images (OS images, snapshots, backups). Filter by type (system|snapshot|backup|app), name, status, etc.

bound_to.description: Filter to images bound to this server id

tools.name: locations_list
tools.description: List Hetzner Cloud regions (fsn1, nbg1, hel1, ash, hil, sin, …). Each location contains one or more datacenters.

tools.name: ssh_keys_list
tools.description: List SSH keys registered in the Hetzner project.

tools.name: ssh_key_get
tools.description: Fetch one SSH key by id.

tools.name: ssh_key_create
tools.description: Register an SSH public key. Reference its id in server_create's ssh_keys[] to seed authorized_keys at boot.

public_key.description: Full SSH public key, e.g. ssh-ed25519 AAAA… comment

tools.name: ssh_key_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete an SSH key. Doesn't affect already-provisioned servers.

tools.name: volume_list
tools.description: List volumes (block storage).

tools.name: volume_get
tools.description: Fetch one volume by id.

tools.name: volume_create
tools.description: Create a new volume. Either `location` (free-floating, attachable later) or `server` (attached at creation). Size in GB; min 10, max 10240.

server.description: Attach to this server at creation (mutually exclusive with location)

format.description: ext4 | xfs — format the volume after create

automount.description: Mount automatically if server is set

tools.name: volume_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete a volume. Must be detached first.

tools.name: volume_update
tools.description: Update a volume's name + labels.

tools.name: volume_attach
tools.description: Attach a volume to a server. The server must be in the same location as the volume.

tools.name: volume_detach
tools.description: Detach a volume from its current server.

tools.name: volume_resize
tools.description: Grow a volume to a new size in GB. Cannot shrink.

size.description: New size in GB; must be greater than current

tools.name: action_list
tools.description: List recent actions across the project (audit log / progress tracker). Each Hetzner mutation returns an action id; poll action_get to wait for completion.

command.description: Filter by command name, e.g. create_server

tools.name: action_get
tools.description: Fetch one action by id. Returns {action: {status, progress, started, finished, error, ...}}. Poll while status=running.
